hero.title: Year-round comfort

categories.title: Our Product Range
categories.subtitle: Solutions for home and business — from compact split systems to industrial heat pumps
categories.homeDesc: Split systems for apartments and houses. Quiet operation, A+++ efficiency
categories.heatPumpDesc: Air-to-air and air-to-water heat pumps. Heating and cooling at minimal cost
categories.commercialDesc: Cassette, ducted and rooftop units for offices, shops and industrial facilities
categories.commercialHeatPumpDesc: High-capacity air-to-water heat pumps for large buildings and production facilities
